tasks.label: Validate new tauri root
args: set -e; cd /home/g/Code/vocalis; rm -f vite.config.js src/App.js src/main.js src/lib/transcriptionParsing.js src/lib/transcriptionParsing.test.js; npm run test; npm run build

tasks.label: Check tauri desktop build
args: set -e; source "$HOME/.cargo/env"; cd /home/g/Code/vocalis; npm run tauri:build -- --no-bundle

tasks.label: Tauri appimage verbose
args: set -e; source "$HOME/.cargo/env"; cd /home/g/Code/vocalis; npm run tauri:build -- --bundles appimage --verbose

tasks.label: Tauri appimage rebuild
args: set -e; source "$HOME/.cargo/env"; cd /home/g/Code/vocalis; npm run tauri:build -- --bundles appimage --verbose

tasks.label: Tauri default build verify
args: set -e; source "$HOME/.cargo/env"; cd /home/g/Code/vocalis; npm run tauri:build

tasks.label: Validate functional UI changes
args: set -e; cd /home/g/Code/vocalis; npm run test; npm run build
